---
layout: cv
title: Madison Loutensock's CV
---
# Madison Loutensock
Data Science

<div id="webaddress">
<a href="madl141900@gmail.com">madl141900@gmail.com</a>
</div>


## Currently

I am a junior majoring in Data Science at Brigham Young University - Idaho.

### Specialized in

SQL, R, Python, Excel, C#, Tableau


## Education

`January 2025 - present`
__Brigham Young University - Idaho | Rexburg, Idaho__

`September 2021 - December 2023`
__Salt Lake Community College | Salt Lake City, Utah__


<!-- A list is also available [online](http://scholar.google.co.uk/citations?user=LTOTl0YAAAAJ) -->


## Occupation

`January 2026 - present`
__Statistics Teachers Assistant__, BYU-I


`March 2021 - present`
__Piano Teacher__, The Piano Place



<!-- ### Footer

Last updated: May 2013 -->
